passives.name: Patronage
passives.effects: Store 15% of {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after modifiers}} dealt. Whenever the stored amount exceeds a value of 333, consume it to {{tip|heal}} yourself and the nearest allied champion for that same amount. Stored damage is reset every round and between each phase in a round.

effects_structured.raw: When stored damage exceeds 333, consume it to heal yourself and the nearest allied champion for that amount.
Stored damage resets every round and between each phase.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: stored damage accrues continuously from post-mitigation damage dealt and is consumed immediately when threshold is exceeded.
On threshold break, heal applies to self and nearest ally for the consumed stored amount; stored pool resets between Arena rounds/phases.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
